results.snippet: August 3, 2015 - Why it matters for providers: ✔️ Billable for 10–20 minutes of RPM treatment management ✔️ Expands beyond the current 20-minute minimum (CPT 99457) ✔️ Supports shorter, clinically valuable patient interactions ✔️ Estimated reimbursement: ~$23.73 (about half of 99457) 📖 𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝗯𝗹𝗼𝗴 𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗹𝗮𝗶𝗻𝘀: • What CPT 99XX5 covers • Documentation and billing requirements • Who can bill the code • Key differences with 99457 and 99458 • How practices can prepare before January 1, 2026 👉 Read the full article here: https: //https://lnkd.in/dFaQiKYy 💬 Do you think CPT 99XX5 will encourage wider adoption of Remote Patient Monitoring programs in small and rural practices?
